## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss performance metrics, LLM tracking, and upcoming product features.](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance metrics show positive trends: increased clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Shifting focus to track LLM prompts for more comprehensive insights](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Exec introducing new features: AI call scoring and AI-powered interview assessments](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [New team member (Garrett) joining Exec next week to assist with action items](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [Last 28 days vs. prior 28 days: Increases in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Top performing content: "30 roleplay scenarios", "types of roleplay"](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Data pulled from Search Console (differs from Elvis's Looker-based approach)](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

### LLM Prompt Tracking

  - [GrowthX using Scrunch tool for LLM prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Exec already using Profound for similar tracking](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Megan to review Exec's Profound account (Sean provided login) and suggest optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [GrowthX team developed formula for determining best prompts to track](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Universal AI Roleplay Features Document

  - [Sean reviewed extensive document shared by Elvis](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Unclear on specific implementation plans](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### AI Call Scoring Feature

  - [Not production-ready, but progressing rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Provides graded feedback based on customizable rubric](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Sean demonstrated 90% score on prospect call](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Relevant keywords: conversational intelligence, call scoring, call diagnostics](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### AI-Powered Interview Assessments

  - [In development, estimated 1 month from launch](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Functions as "coding assessment for salespeople"](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Candidates perform mock sales calls as part of interview process](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Helps evaluate real-world skills before human interview time investment](https://fathom.video/share/cSyH_EL_mqDKW1qe-E7xfubyacvr9zEs?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
